title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Barista - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Barista is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Barista:
Barista is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Barista!
